headline: Adams Natural Resources Fund Yields 8% While Energy Stocks Face Sector Headwinds
summary: Adams Natural Resources Fund (NYSE:PEO) trades at a roughly 10% discount to its net asset value and has delivered a 27% one-year total return. The fund’s 8% trailing yield based on its $2.05 per share in 2025 distributions attracts income-focused investors, though that yield carries real commodity risk. How PEO Generates Income PEO is a ...
